title: CDAC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 15 Project Manager and Senior Project Engineer Posts
organization: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (CDAC)
post_name: Project Manager and Senior Project Engineer
short_info: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (CDAC) Recruitment 2026: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 15 Project Manager and Senior Project Engineer posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 56 years for Project Manager, Max: 40 years for Senior Project Engineer
age_limit.details: Project Manager: Maximum age limit is 56 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India norms for SC/ST/OBC/Physically Handicapped/Ex-Servicemen, 5 years for Government servants, and 5 years for C-DAC internal candidates. Senior Project Engineer: Maximum age limit is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India norms for SC/ST/OBC/Physically Handicapped/Ex-Servicemen, 5 years for Government servants, and 5 years for C-DAC internal candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/B-Tech or equivalent, Post Graduate degree in Science/Computer Application, M.E./M.Tech or equivalent, Ph.D.
qualification.details: Project Manager: BE/B-Tech. or equivalent degree with First Class (60% or equivalent CGPA), Post Graduate degree in Science/ Computer Application or in relevant discipline with First Class (60% or equivalent CGPA), M.E./M.Tech or equivalent degree, Ph.D. in relevant discipline. Minimum 9 years of relevant post qualification experience. Senior Project Engineer: BE/B-Tech. or equivalent degree with First Class (60% or equivalent CGPA), Post Graduate Degree with First Class (60% or equivalent CGPA) in Science/Computer Applications or related field, M.E./M.Tech or equivalent degree, Ph.D. in relevant discipline. Minimum 4 years of relevant post qualification experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Minimum 17.52 lakh per annum for Project Manager, Minimum ₹10.11/-lakhs per annum for Senior Project Engineer
salary_details.project manager: Minimum 17.52 lakh per annum, based on relevant post-qualification experience, as per C-DAC norms (CTC includes benefits like medical reimbursement, PF, canteen subsidy, leave encashment, gratuity etc.)
salary_details.senior project engineer: Minimum ₹10.11/-lakhs per annum based on the post qualification relevant experience as per C-DAC norms (CTC includes benefits like Medical reimbursement, PF, Canteen subsidy, Leave encashment, Gratuity, etc.)

selection_process: Preliminary scrutiny based on academic and other parameters Interview

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CDAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled for 23rd May 2026 and 30th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on one of these dates within the registration timings.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in CDAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: CDAC is recruiting for the positions of Project Manager and Senior Project Engineer. These are contract-based roles within the organization.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification includes a BE/B-Tech or equivalent degree. Higher qualifications like Post Graduate degrees, M.E./M.Tech, or Ph.D. in relevant disciplines are also accepted.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Project Manager and Senior Project Engineer?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Project Manager is 56 years, and for Senior Project Engineer, it is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: For Project Manager, the minimum salary is 17.52 lakh per annum. For Senior Project Engineer, the minimum salary is ₹10.11 lakhs per annum, both based on experience and C-DAC norms.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for the CDAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and report to the venue with all required documents on the specified dates.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original and self-attested photocopies of documents supporting age, educational qualifications, experience, and caste (if applicable), along with a filled application form and passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Noida, Uttar Pradesh, at the Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (CDAC) facility. The exact address is provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for CDAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for these positions. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies announced by CDAC?
faq.answer: CDAC has announced a total of 15 vacancies for the posts of Project Manager and Senior Project Engineer combined.
